## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security/governance

## Validation

- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make repo-check`
- [ ] Terraform plan reviewed, if applicable

## Risk

Describe blast radius, rollback path, and any migration steps.
